description:
Expose a slash command in `@packages/pi-om-extension` so the user can inspect the same observational-memory data currently available via the `om_status` and `om_observations` tools, without requiring LLM tool use.

Scope:
- Add a user-facing slash command (or commands) that surfaces OM status and/or observations directly in the Pi UI.
- Read from the existing JSON-backed observational-memory data source rather than introducing new storage.
- Render the output in a human-friendly format instead of raw JSON.
- Keep the implementation lightweight and non-LLM-driven.

Acceptance criteria:
- A user can run a slash command and view OM information directly.
- Output is clearly formatted for humans.
- Existing tool behavior for `om_status` / `om_observations` remains intact.
- Tests cover formatting / command behavior in `@packages/pi-om-extension`.
title: Add user-facing slash command for OM status/observations in @packages/pi-om-extension
